tooltip.ototarot.claim_generator.tooltip: §6When used, your team's claim will be created in a 10x10 zone centered at you.§r
tooltip.ototarot.terrain_claimer.tooltip: §6Can be used to modify your claim's border.§r
tooltip.ototarot.terrain_inspector.toolt: §6Allows you to see who's the owner of the claim you're standing on.§r
item.ototarot.claim_blocks_granter_one.d: When used, your team will be granted 1 Claim Block.
item.ototarot.claim_blocks_granter_one.m: Your team gained 1 Claim Block! You can use a Terrain Claimer to expand your terrain.
